info.title: Automation Actions V4
info.x-hubspot-api-use-case: You want to empower other users in your account to automate specialized parts of their day-to-day processes (e.g., creating highly customized quotes based on the data from an enrolled contact and their associations).
info.x-hubspot-introduction: Use the automation API to define custom actions in the HubSpot workflows tool, which allows users in your account to integrate with external services as they build out a HubSpot workflow.

parameters.name: callbackId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the callback to complete.

post.description: Completes the specified callback action. Returns no content on success.
Completes a batch of callback actions in a single request. Returns no content on success.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of results to display per page

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: The paging cursor token of the last successfully read resource will be returned as the `paging.next.after` JSON property of a paged response containing more results

parameters.name: archived
parameters.description: Whether to return only results that have been archived

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: The integer ID of the app whose action definitions are retrieved.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of automation action extension definitions for the specified app.

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: The integer ID of the app for which a new action definition is created.

post.description: Returns the newly created automation action extension definition for the specified app.

parameters.name: definitionId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the action definition whose functions are listed.

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: The integer ID of the app owning the action definition.

get.description: Returns all functions associated with the specified automation action extension definition.

parameters.name: definitionId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the action definition to retrieve the function from.

parameters.name: functionType
parameters.description: The function type to retrieve. Allowed: PRE_ACTION_EXECUTION, PRE_FETCH_OPTIONS, POST_FETCH_OPTIONS, POST_ACTION_EXECUTION.

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: The integer ID of the app associated with the action definition.

get.description: Returns all functions matching the specified type for the given extension definition.

put.summary: Insert a function for a definition

parameters.name: definitionId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the action definition to create or replace the function on.

parameters.name: functionType
parameters.description: The function type to create or replace. Allowed: PRE_ACTION_EXECUTION, PRE_FETCH_OPTIONS, POST_FETCH_OPTIONS, POST_ACTION_EXECUTION.

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the app to associate with the function type.

put.description: Returns the created or replaced function of the specified type for the given extension definition.

delete.summary: Delete a function for a definition

parameters.name: definitionId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the action definition whose function type will be archived.

parameters.name: functionType
parameters.description: The function type to archive. Allowed values: PRE_ACTION_EXECUTION, PRE_FETCH_OPTIONS, POST_FETCH_OPTIONS, POST_ACTION_EXECUTION.

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the app whose function type will be archived.

delete.description: Deletes all functions of the specified type for the given definition. Returns no content on success.

get.summary: Get a definition revision by ID

parameters.name: definitionId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the action definition whose revision will be retrieved.

parameters.name: revisionId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the revision to retrieve.

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the app associated with the definition revision.

get.description: Returns a specific revision of the extension definition identified by the given revision ID.

parameters.name: definitionId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the action definition to retrieve.

parameters.name: archived
parameters.description: Whether to return only results that have been archived

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the app associated with the action definition.

get.description: Returns the automation action extension definition matching the specified definition ID.

parameters.name: definitionId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the action definition to archive.

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the app whose action definition will be archived.

delete.description: Archives the specified extension definition. Returns no content on success.

parameters.name: definitionId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the action definition to update.

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the app associated with the action definition to update.

patch.description: Returns the updated automation action extension definition after applying the provided partial changes.

get.summary: Get a function for a given definition

parameters.name: definitionId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the action definition containing the target function.

parameters.name: functionType
parameters.description: The function type to retrieve. Allowed values: PRE_ACTION_EXECUTION, PRE_FETCH_OPTIONS, POST_FETCH_OPTIONS, POST_ACTION_EXECUTION.

parameters.name: functionId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the function to retrieve.

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the app associated with the function to retrieve.

get.description: Returns the function matching the specified type and function ID for the given extension definition.

put.summary: Insert a function for a definition

parameters.name: definitionId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the action definition for the function to create or replace.

parameters.name: functionType
parameters.description: The function type to create or replace. Allowed values: PRE_ACTION_EXECUTION, PRE_FETCH_OPTIONS, POST_FETCH_OPTIONS, POST_ACTION_EXECUTION.

parameters.name: functionId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the function to create or replace.

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: The unique numeric identifier of the app owning the definition.

put.description: Returns the inserted or replaced function details for the specified definition, function type, and function ID.

delete.summary: Archive a function for a definition

parameters.name: definitionId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the extension definition containing the function.

parameters.name: functionType
parameters.description: The execution stage of the function. Must be one of: PRE_ACTION_EXECUTION, PRE_FETCH_OPTIONS, POST_FETCH_OPTIONS, POST_ACTION_EXECUTION.

parameters.name: functionId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the function to delete.

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: The unique numeric identifier of the app owning the definition.

delete.description: Returns no content upon successfully archiving the specified function from the given definition.

parameters.name: definitionId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the extension definition whose revisions are retrieved.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of results to display per page

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: The paging cursor token of the last successfully read resource will be returned as the `paging.next.after` JSON property of a paged response containing more results

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: The unique numeric identifier of the app owning the definition.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all revisions associated with the specified automation action definition.

functionSource.description: The source code of the function.

functionType.description: The lifecycle stage at which the function executes.

id.description: The unique identifier of the function.

PublicActionFunction.description: Defines a serverless function associated with an automation action, including its source code and execution lifecycle type.

functions.description: List of function identifiers associated with this action.

actionUrl.description: The URL endpoint invoked when the action executes.

published.description: Indicates whether the action is published and available for use.

labels.description: Localized display labels for the action, keyed by language code.

inputFields.description: List of input fields the action accepts during execution.

outputFields.description: List of output fields the action returns after execution.

revisionId.description: The identifier of the current revision of the action definition.

archivedAt.description: Timestamp (ms) when the action was archived, if applicable.

inputFieldDependencies.description: Conditional dependencies that control input field visibility or behavior.

executionRules.description: Rules that govern how the action execution is translated or applied.

id.description: The unique identifier of the action definition.

objectTypes.description: CRM object types this action can be applied to.

objectRequestOptions.description: Options specifying which object properties to include in action requests.

PublicActionDefinition.description: Defines a custom automation action, including its endpoint, input/output fields, labels, associated functions, and publication state.

PublicConditionalSingleFieldDependency.title: CONDITIONAL_SINGLE_FIELD

dependencyType.description: The type of field dependency; always CONDITIONAL_SINGLE_FIELD.

controllingFieldName.description: Name of the field that controls the dependency.

controllingFieldValue.description: The value of the controlling field that triggers the dependency.

dependentFieldNames.description: List of field names dependent on the controlling field's value.

PublicConditionalSingleFieldDependency.description: Defines a conditional dependency where dependent fields are shown or hidden based on a single controlling field's value.

oneOf.description: A simple single-field dependency between input fields.
A conditional single-field dependency triggered by a specific field value.

PublicActionDefinitionInputFieldDependen.description: Defines a field dependency as either a single-field or conditional single-field dependency type.

properties.description: List of property names to include in the object response.

PublicObjectRequestOptions.description: Options for a public object request, specifying which properties to retrieve.

subCategory.description: A specific category that contains more specific detail about the error

code.description: The status code associated with the error detail

in.description: The name of the field or parameter in which the error was found

message.description: A human readable message describing the error along with remediation steps where appropriate

ErrorDetail.description: Detailed error information including message, code, category, and contextual data.

inputFieldDescriptions.description: Map of input field names to their descriptive text.

appDisplayName.description: Display name of the app associated with the action.

outputFieldLabels.description: Map of output field names to their display labels.

inputFieldOptionLabels.description: Nested map of input field option keys to their display labels.

actionDescription.description: Human-readable description of the action's purpose.

executionRules.description: Map of execution rule keys to their display label strings.

inputFieldLabels.description: Map of input field names to their display labels.

actionCardContent.description: Text content displayed on the action's summary card.

PublicActionLabels.description: Localized display labels for an action, including field labels, descriptions, and card content.

PublicSingleFieldDependency.title: SINGLE_FIELD

dependencyType.description: The type of field dependency; always 'SINGLE_FIELD'.

controllingFieldName.description: The name of the field that controls the dependency.

dependentFieldNames.description: List of field names dependent on the controlling field.

PublicSingleFieldDependency.description: Defines a SINGLE_FIELD dependency linking a controlling field to one or more dependent fields.

next.description: Cursor and link information for retrieving the next page.

ForwardPaging.description: Pagination wrapper containing a reference to the next page of results.

helpText.description: Supplementary help text displayed alongside the field.

referencedObjectType.description: The HubSpot object type this field references.

name.description: The internal name identifier of the field type.

options.description: List of selectable options available for the field.

description.description: A human-readable description of the field type.

externalOptionsReferenceType.description: Reference type used to resolve externally sourced options.

label.description: The display label shown to users for the field.

type.description: The data type of the field value (e.g., string, number, bool).

fieldType.description: The UI control type used to render the field.

optionsUrl.description: URL endpoint for fetching field options dynamically.

externalOptions.description: Indicates whether options are loaded from an external source.

FieldTypeDefinition.description: Defines the type, display, and option configuration for an action input field.

results.description: List of action function identifiers in the response.

CollectionResponsePublicActionFunctionId.description: A collection of action function identifiers returned without paging.

isRequired.description: Indicates whether the input field is required.

typeDefinition.description: The type definition details for this input field.

supportedValueTypes.description: List of value types accepted by this input field.

InputFieldDefinition.description: Defines an input field for an action, including its type and accepted value sources.

labelName.description: The display label name for this translation rule.

conditions.description: Key-value map of conditions that trigger this translation rule.

PublicExecutionTranslationRule.description: Defines a translation rule mapping execution conditions to a display label.

functionType.description: The execution stage at which this function is invoked.

id.description: The unique identifier of the action function.

PublicActionFunctionIdentifier.description: Identifies a function associated with a public action by type and optional ID.

revisionId.description: The unique identifier for this action revision.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when this revision was created.

definition.description: The full action definition associated with this revision.

id.description: The unique identifier of the action revision record.

PublicActionRevision.description: Represents a versioned revision of a public action definition.

CallbackCompletionRequest.description: Request payload for completing an action callback with output field values.

paging.description: Forward paging metadata for retrieving the next result set.

results.description: The list of returned public action definitions.

CollectionResponsePublicActionDefinition.description: A paginated collection of public action definitions with forward paging support.

subCategory.description: A specific category that contains more specific detail about the error

correlationId.description: A unique identifier for the request. Include this value with any error reports or support tickets

links.description: A map of link names to associated URIs containing documentation about the error or recommended remediation steps

message.description: A human readable message describing the error along with remediation steps where appropriate
message.example: Invalid input (details will vary based on the error)

example.message: Invalid input (details will vary based on the error)

Error.description: Standard error response object containing details about a failed request

paging.description: Forward paging cursor for retrieving the next results page

results.description: Array of public action revision objects returned in this page

CollectionResponsePublicActionRevisionFo.description: Paginated collection of public action revision records

A conditional single-field dependency between input fields

objectRequestOptions.description: Options specifying which object properties to fetch at execution time.

inputFields.description: Updated list of input field definitions for the action.

outputFields.description: Updated list of output field definitions returned by the action.

actionUrl.description: The URL endpoint invoked when the action executes.

inputFieldDependencies.description: Conditional dependencies controlling input field visibility or behavior.

published.description: Whether the action is published and available for use in workflows.

executionRules.description: Rules that govern how and when the action execution is translated.

objectTypes.description: CRM object types this action is applicable to.

objectRequestOptions.description: Options specifying which object properties to fetch at execution time.

labels.description: Localized display labels for the action, keyed by language code.

inputs.description: Array of individual callback completion requests in the batch.

BatchInputCallbackCompletionBatchRequest.description: A batch of callback completion requests to resolve multiple pending action callbacks.

oneOf.description: A simple dependency based on a single controlling input field.
A conditional dependency driven by a single input field's value.

hidden.description: Whether this option is hidden from the user interface.

readOnly.description: Indicates whether the option is read-only.

label.description: Display label shown to users for the option.

value.description: Stored string value representing the option.

Option.description: A selectable option for an input field, including its label, value, and display metadata.

typeDefinition.description: The type definition describing the output field's data type and structure.

OutputFieldDefinition.description: Defines an output field, including its type definition for an automation action.

link.description: URL link to the next page of results.

after.description: Cursor token used to fetch the next page of results.

NextPage.description: Pagination cursor object used to retrieve the next page of results.

scopes.automation: Read from and write to my Workflows
